title: Stichting Koraal & Via Jeugd
details:
Stichting Koraal & Via Jeugd — Program Manager Merger (2025–present)

Integrated executive steering of the merger between Stichting Koraal and Via Jeugd, two specialized care and education organizations in Limburg and North Brabant. Koraal has approximately 3,000 FTEs, provides care and education to nearly 5,000 clients and pupils, and reports € 333 million in revenue (2024). The two-year program covers nine domains, including governance, finance, HR, real estate, ICT, procurement and communication. The legal merger took effect on 1 July 2025. Focus on delivering efficiency and synergy goals, alignment with both organizations' executive boards, supervisory boards and works councils, and safeguarding the continuity of specialized youth care.

title: Parnassia Groep
details:
Parnassia Groep — Program Manager (2020–2023)

Program management of an organization-wide service-delivery improvement at one of the largest mental-health-care organizations in the Netherlands, with approximately 13,000 employees, more than 158,000 clients and € 1.4 billion in revenue (2024). The program covered executive alignment with the executive board, financiers and national chain partners, leadership of a complex European tender including a vendor change at an underperforming party, and the strategic integration with national healthcare infrastructure (MedMij, DigiD), including the redesign of organization-wide access and authorization processes.

title: Royal Smit BV
details:
Royal Smit BV — Chief Information Officer (2016–2017)

CIO role at an international transformer manufacturer with 700 employees and € 300 million in revenue. Development and delivery of a five-year vision and strategy for the international business unit. Leadership of a 15-person department in an engineer-to-order production environment. Strategic selection and implementation of enterprise systems supporting the production process, including business-case development for a production-optimization program.

title: InnovioPapers BV
description: Chief Information Officer during Carve-out and Transition (2014–2016)
details:
InnovioPapers BV — Chief Information Officer during Carve-out and Transition (2014–2016)

CIO and strategic program manager during the spin-off of paper mill InnovioPapers (300 employees, € 100 million in revenue) from the South African multinational Sappi Paper. Integrated steering of the complete carve-out of the ICT organization, application landscape and infrastructure. Implementation of a Manufacturing Execution System (MES) and infrastructure optimization. Redesign of supplier management for continuity and scalability.

title: ROC Friese Poort
details:
ROC Friese Poort — Program Manager Systems Integration (2017–2019)

Program management of the institution-wide rollout of a core system for 12,000 students. Executive alignment and tendering strategy within the vocational-education context. Leadership of 12 sub-projects with 10 project managers, applying Lean methodology for process optimization. Phasing out of various legacy registration systems and integration with the financial administration.

title: Stichting Daelzicht
description: Program and Portfolio Manager and Strategic Consultant (2018–2019)
details:
Stichting Daelzicht — Program and Portfolio Manager and Strategic Consultant (2018–2019)

Program steering of the project-management team for the delivery of a new organizational strategy at care institution Daelzicht. Strategic advice to the directors and executive board on policy-execution optimization. Setup of project portfolio management with 104 actively-managed projects, focused on themes such as youth & family, nutrition, ICT and facilities restructuring.

title: Stichting Josephscholen Nijmegen
details:
Stichting Josephscholen Nijmegen — Manager and Transformation Lead (2018–2020)

Development and delivery of strategy and organizational design for an education organization with 3,775 pupils. Leadership of executive decision-making, tendering and transition to a new ICT environment, combined with organizational development and change management.

title: Stichting Scala Scholen
details:
Stichting Scala Scholen — Quartermaster and Strategic Information Manager (2018–2020)

Design and delivery of a strategic plan for digitalization and automation within a primary-education organization in North Brabant. Leadership of European tenders and outsourcing trajectories. Build-up of an in-house management organization including coaching of staff during the transition.

title: Radboud University Nijmegen
details:
Radboud University Nijmegen — Strategic Advisor Organizational Projects (2024–present)

Advisory work on the replacement of the Current Research Information System (CRIS) with impact across the entire research environment of Radboud University and Radboud UMC. Guidance of complex organizational changes within a university context. Advisory work on the development of a central payment system for research participants, with attention to governance and compliance.

title: Zuyd University of Applied Sciences
description: Program Manager Research Project Lifecycle Management (2025–present)
details:
Zuyd University of Applied Sciences — Program Manager Research Project Lifecycle Management (2025–present)

Program manager of a transformation program improving the support of research groups. Redesign of the entire research support function — from idea to valorization. Strategic tendering and implementation of a new platform for the full research lifecycle.

title: ROC Ter AA
details:
ROC Ter AA — Quartermaster Program Management (2016–2017)

Setup of a project organization following Prince2 within a new governance model. Integrated steering of the systems landscape and executive alignment with the directors. Leadership of European tenders and management of 11 project managers.

title: Sappi Nijmegen BV
details:
Sappi Nijmegen BV — IT Carve-out and Audit

In the context of a planned acquisition, a carve-out plan was drawn up for the entire IT organization of Sappi Nijmegen. The audit covered infrastructure, MES, ERP, office automation, telephony and support processes, and delivered a complete IT dossier for due diligence.

title: KNMP
details:
KNMP — Strategic Project Manager Knowledge Base (2023–2024)

Strategic project leadership for the modernization of the unique medication database serving all Dutch pharmacists. Problem analysis and development of a project structure for knowledge unlocking, focused on more effective support of pharmacists. Stakeholder management within a professional association.

title: KION Childcare
details:
KION Childcare — Program Manager VoIP Implementation

Program steering of the rollout of VoIP telephony across 100 sites of a large childcare organization, including the integration trajectory with existing systems.

title: ROC Nijmegen
details:
ROC Nijmegen — Program Manager Electronic Learning Environment

Program management of the implementation of an Electronic Learning Environment (ELE) following a public tender. Delivery of a broadly-supported implementation plan with focus on training and adoption. Use of Prince2 as project methodology with alignment across six parallel sub-projects.

title: LiQiT Dienstverlening
details:
LiQiT Dienstverlening — Managing Director and Owner (2006–2016)

Founder and director of a service-delivery company focused on the education sector. More than ten years of executive and operational leadership of a team of professionals serving a broad customer base. Integrated responsibility for operations, HR, finance, sales, customer relations and strategic development.

title: Albeda MBO
details: Albeda MBO — Optimization of service delivery per business unit using a central Product-Services Catalogue.

title: INR Trombosedienst Nijmegen
details: INR Trombosedienst Nijmegen — Program management of the digitalization and modernization of patient management and medical monitoring.

title: Landstede Zwolle
details: Landstede Zwolle — Strategic advice focused on the alignment between education and modern educational technologies.

title: Veiligheidsregio Gelderland Zuid
details: Veiligheidsregio Gelderland Zuid — Advice on performance improvement of a supplier following a public tender, with focus on contract management and SLA optimization.
